acceptanceCriteria: Write resources unreachable from production factory (test + runtime)

resolvedDecisions.decision: Defer implementation until Layer 0 verifies the path; SandboxWriteClientFactory-backed promotion resources are optional for #301, absence is not a regression.
conflictingSources: GitHub issue #301 body ("Matches Layer 0 contracts from #287, #289, #291")
contract-collection.md #20-23 (method/path TBD from Promotion API Testing Tool)

resolvedDecisions.decision: Implement using the stated 202309 PUT path only; do not use the unconfirmed 202509 full-replace variant; keep body fields minimal until a verified sample exists.
conflictingSources: contract-collection.md #18 (path stated, no captured cURL/response demo)

resolvedDecisions.topic: Confirm Package Shipment API family (#291, contract-collection.md #39)
resolvedDecisions.decision: Use the Supply Chain API path (POST /supply_chain/202309/packages/sync), not a /fulfillment/ path -- this endpoint moved API families per the verified contract note.

inScope: Inventory update resource behind SandboxWriteClientFactory (Layer 0 #287, #14 verified)
Product create + edit resources behind SandboxWriteClientFactory (Layer 0 #287, #17 verified / #18 path-stated)
Fulfillment combine/ship/uncombine/split/confirm-shipment resources behind SandboxWriteClientFactory (Layer 0 #291, #29-#41 paths stated)
SandboxWriteClientFactory.create_resources() entry point mirroring the existing ProductionReadClientFactory.create_resources() convention
Technical validation evidence (signing, HTTP status, TikTok code, response parsing) for every implemented write path
outOfScope: Promotion lifecycle write endpoints (#289) -- paths TBD, see resolvedDecisions
ETL normalization / Postgres upserts (already shipped in #299)
Any change to ProductionReadClientFactory, ProductionReadResources, or the production-read guard allowlist
P2-A3 feature aggregates (#300) -- separate slice, separate child cache
doNotLoad: any other sibling grill-cache-issue-<n>.json under parent #278
promptCacheBlock:
# Issue #301 -- Child scope (unique)

## In scope
- Layer 2 sandbox writes only: inventory update, product create/edit, fulfillment
  combine/ship/uncombine/split/confirm-shipment -- all behind
  SandboxWriteClientFactory.create_resources()

## Out of scope
- Promotion lifecycle (#289 paths TBD -- deferred, not a regression)
- Layer 1 reads (#297, done) and ETL (#299, done)
- Production factory / guard allowlist changes

## Bar
Technical validation (signing, HTTP status, TikTok code, response parsing). Business
failures from sparse sandbox data are OK.

phaseCacheBlocks.scope:
# Issue #301 -- Child scope (unique)

See promptCacheBlock. Full detail: agent-runtime/artifacts/grill-cache/scope-alignment-issue-301.md
phaseCacheBlocks.meta:
# Meta -- #301

- Executor domain: backend
- Context Plan: docs/integrations/tiktok_api/{contract-collection,endpoints}.md +
  backend/src/juli_backend/integrations/tiktok/MODULE.md + handoff
- Skills: backend (domain executor)
- Gate: do not assign Executor until this cache's cacheStatus == valid (it is)
phaseCacheBlocks.executor:
# Executor -- #301

- MODULE: backend/src/juli_backend/integrations/tiktok/MODULE.md
- Files in play: factories.py (add create_resources), client.py (add put()),
  resources/products.py (add create/edit), new resources/fulfillment.py,
  constants.py (add product create/edit + fulfillment path helpers)
- TDD scope: one red test per write path from contract-collection.md #14-41
  (excluding #20-23 promotion, deferred)
- Do not touch ProductionReadClientFactory / ProductionReadResources
phaseCacheBlocks.review:
# Review -- #301

- Acceptance mapping: write-unreachable-from-production, matches-Layer-0-contracts,
  technical-validation-documented
- Modules touched: integrations/tiktok only
- Check: every new write path appears in capabilities.SANDBOX_ALLOWED_REQUESTS
  before use; no new path is invented for promotion
phaseCacheBlocks.validate:
# Validate -- #301

- Gate list: unit tests green, no production-factory regression, coverage threshold
  met, technical validation evidence present in implementation artifact
- Command: pytest tests/ -v --tb=short --cov=juli_backend --cov-report=term-missing
  --cov-fail-under=80

skills.purpose: Backend/FastAPI executor domain skill for sandbox write TDD

glossarySnippets.definition: Sandbox write success bar per the Phase 2 handoff: correct request signing, correct HTTP status handling, correct TikTok `code` interpretation, correct response parsing. Business failures on sparse sandbox data are acceptable and do not block ship.
The write-validation-only merchant auth ID (7658096633384781588). Never used for production reads; never receives Fujiwa credentials.
